system.flavor: You summon a fickle and playful hob of spring, prancing with incredible leaps and bounds.
system.effect:
Effect a spring hob in range.

Spring hob
Summon (2)
Summon Action spring hob teleports into space of the furthest ally from its space, then grants 3 vigor to all adjacent allies, increased by +1d6 for allies in crisis.
Summon Effect a round, for each hob, you may attempt to repeat the summon action by rolling the effect die. On a (1-3), dismiss the hob instead and leave a difficult terrain flower patch in its space.
